allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "where node 2>nul & where npm 2>nul & node --version 2>nul & npm --version 2>nul")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);const s=new TextDecoder\("latin1"\).decode\(fs.readFileSync\("C:/Users/alex/Downloads/Movimientos de Tarjeta.xls"\)\);console.log\("spurious charset:0 offset:", s.search\(/charset:0/i\)\);console.log\("real meta charset=iso offset:", s.search\(/charset=iso/i\)\);const ctx=s.slice\(Math.max\(0,s.search\(/charset:0/i\)-25\), s.search\(/charset:0/i\)+12\);console.log\("context:", JSON.stringify\(ctx\)\);')
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path node_modules\) { "node_modules OK" } else { "necesita npm install" }; \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts)
PowerShell(npx tsc -b --force 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\\('\)[0] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Count,Name | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\alex\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\alx_FinTrack"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,5174,4173,3000 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; Write-Output "---node procs---"; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(awk -F= '/^VITE_/ {key=$1; val=substr\($0, length\(key\)+2\); print key " => " length\(val\) " chars"}' .env.local)
